### Does the PR have any schema changes?

Found 13 breaking changes:

#### Resources
- "aws:paymentcryptography/key:Key":
    - inputs:
        - `🟡` "keyAttributes" type changed from "array" to "#/types/aws:paymentcryptography/KeyKeyAttributes:KeyKeyAttributes"
        - `🟡` "keyAttributes" had &{Type: Ref:#/types/aws:paymentcryptography/KeyKeyAttributes:KeyKeyAttributes AdditionalProperties:<nil> Items:<nil> OneOf:[] Discriminator:<nil> Plain:false} but now has no type
    - properties:
        - `🟡` "keyAttributes" type changed from "array" to "#/types/aws:paymentcryptography/KeyKeyAttributes:KeyKeyAttributes"
        - `🟡` "keyAttributes" had &{Type: Ref:#/types/aws:paymentcryptography/KeyKeyAttributes:KeyKeyAttributes AdditionalProperties:<nil> Items:<nil> OneOf:[] Discriminator:<nil> Plain:false} but now has no type
- "aws:s3/bucket:Bucket":
    - inputs:
        - `🟡` "loggings" missing
        - `🟡` "versionings" missing
        - `🟡` "websites" missing
    - properties:
        - `🟡` missing output "loggings"
        - `🟡` missing output "versionings"
        - `🟡` missing output "websites"
- "aws:s3/bucketAclV2:BucketAclV2":
    - general:
        - `🟢` retained as deprecated alias; migrate to "aws:s3/bucketAcl:BucketAcl"

#### Types
- "aws:lb/GetListenerRuleAction:GetListenerRuleAction":
    - properties:
        - `🟡` "forward" missing
- "aws:paymentcryptography/KeyKeyAttributes:KeyKeyAttributes":
    - properties:
        - `🟡` "keyModesOfUse" type changed from "string" to "array"
        - `🟡` "keyModesOfUse" had no type but now has &{Type:string Ref: AdditionalProperties:<nil> Items:<nil> OneOf:[] Discriminator:<nil> Plain:false}

#### New resources:

- `s3/bucketAcl.BucketAcl`
